metadata.description: Ops Hub: a duplicatable Notion operations hub plus the skills that shape it to your team and keep it current.

plugins.name: ops-hub
plugins.description: Set up and operate a client-centric Notion operations hub (clients, projects, tasks, pipeline, and living client/project context pages). A setup web app tailors the hub to your team; skills read a Notion config page plus live schema before acting, and confirm before every write. Includes hub-setup (the structure conductor) and write/update skill pairs per object.
